shared_properties: Rotor footprint remains 24x24 px with a centered axle and eight evenly spaced teeth readable at high speed.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while blade colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Outer diameter occupies at least 22 px so the blade feels larger than the player shoulder width.
differences: Eight frames cover a full 360 degree clockwise rotation at 24 fps for a mechanical hazard cadence.
Cold-steel teeth use #8FA8B8 highlights on the outer arc while the hub remains dark and heavy.
Motion blur is avoided entirely so each tooth remains crisp at every angle.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 24x24 saw blade size, fixed-position rotation hazard, and one-hit HP loss behavior used in dark zones.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the cold metallic hazard language and grim shaft atmosphere needed for late-run threats.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-to-hazard scale so the saw reads as a large, unfair-looking but clearly visible trap.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards or SpriteSheetBundle for animated hazards, all rendered with nearest-neighbor sampling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load hazard textures and atlases during the shared Loading state and expose handles through HazardVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Keep collision volumes in gameplay components rather than inferring them from visual pixels.
Align every hazard origin to the 16x16 grid unless the authored size is 24x24 or 48x16 by design.
Use visibility toggles or atlas index changes instead of runtime texture swaps to avoid hitching during repeated descent loops.

context.usage: Rotating stationary hazard introduced in the dark zone and abyss.

rotation_notes: Hub diameter is 6 px and stays centered at x12 y12 in every frame.
Tooth tips reach at least x1 and x23 across the rotation cycle.
No tooth overlap or smear exceeds 1 px beyond the 24x24 bounds.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x24 px with 8 frames of 24x24 px and 0 px spacing.
All 8 frames keep the axle centered at x12 y12 and preserve a full visible tooth ring.
Palette uses only the listed steel and shadow colors plus transparency, with no motion blur or anti-aliasing.
